It must stay open until Fizeau has shipped the release from Fizeau bead fizeau-00ac697d. Required Fizeau release contents: no-op compaction policy removed; Fizeau-owned transcript/progress contract landed; shared transcript emitter/conformance tests landed; root package boundary cleanup sufficient for a stable public service API. After the tag exists, update DDx's Fizeau dependency to that release and run focused service/session/progress tests.

DDx go.mod/go.sum reference that Fizeau release.\n3. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -run 'Test.*Service|Test.*Session|Test.*Progress' -count=1 passes.\n4. cd cli && go test ./... passes or any failures are documented as unrelated pre-existing failures.

ID:       ddx-638a3b87
Title:    Forward Fizeau events opaquely and keep only final-result adapter
Type:     task
Status:   open
Priority: 0

Desc:     Reduce DDx's Fizeau service consumption to opaque event forwarding plus final-result projection for DDx bookkeeping. DDx may decode Fizeau final/routing data needed for Result fields, but must not reconstruct tool transcripts, render progress semantics, or synthesize runtime outcomes. In-scope files: cli/internal/agent/agent_runner_service.go, cli/internal/agent/service_run.go, worker/server progress surfaces, run/session index fields that store Fizeau event/artifact references. Out of scope: Fizeau event schema changes.
Accept:   1. DDx stores or forwards Fizeau ServiceEvents without modifying their payloads.\n2. DDx final adapter decodes only final status/output/tokens/cost/actual route/session artifact fields needed for DDx Result.\n3. DDx does not reconstruct tool-call transcripts from Fizeau events for policy decisions.\n4. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent ./internal/server -run 'Test.*Service|Test.*Run|Test.*Worker|Test.*ToolCall' -count=1 passes.

Updated:  2026-05-05 12:27:12
spec-id: FEAT-006

Out of scope: DDx final Result projection from Fizeau final events.

DDX_USE_NEW_AGENT_PATH legacy fallback is removed or cannot route transcript-producing agent work through DDx-owned parser code.\n4. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -run 'Test.*Claude|Test.*Agent|Test.*Service' -count=1 passes.

DDx can still expose links or artifact pointers to Fizeau session logs where needed.\n4. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent ./internal/server -run 'Test.*Session|Test.*Worker|Test.*Progress' -count=1 passes.

Docs no longer say DDx renders Fizeau inner session logs.\n4. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -run TestAgent -count=1 passes or no code tests are needed because only docs changed.

data.text: I’m verifying the specific blocker preconditions now: whether the required Fizeau release is tagged in the local repo and whether `cli/go.mod` already points at it. If either is missing, this bead cannot be completed in this pass.
